description: Recipe in YouTube description only, no transcript recipe content
sourceText:
YouTube title:
Morning V60 Brew — No Talking ASMR

YouTube description:
ASMR coffee brewing. No talking, just the sounds of brewing.

Recipe used in this video:
- V60 dripper
- 18g coffee, medium-fine grind
- 300g water at 93°C
- Bloom: 50g, 40 seconds
- Pour 1: to 180g
- Pour 2: to 300g
- Total time: ~3:15

YouTube transcript:
[ambient sounds of water pouring and dripping for 4 minutes]
